title: Creating Stunning Autumn Illustrations with Illustrate Ai
description:
Learn how to make beautiful autumn illustrations using Illustrate Ai from DesignBundles. In this tutorial, I'll show you the simple steps to create stunning fall-themed artwork. Perfect for artists of all levels

Join our Community https://www.facebook.com/groups/pixaromacrafts/
transcript: Welcome back to a new video. Today I'll show you how to create cool autumn illustrations  using Illustrate AI from design bundles. Here's a list showcasing various landscapes,  from forests to canyons, and atmospheric elements, including falling leaves to shadowed woods.  Here's another list highlighting various flora, from maple leaves to Hawthorns, and fauna,  such as squirrels, deer, to peasants. Another list featuring various activities and events,  from apple picking to mushroom foraging, and buildings and structures, including barns,  farmhouses, to autumn festival tents. Next, we've got a selection of clothing and accessories,  ranging from scarves to capes, as well as foods and beverages, featuring items like hot cocoa and gravy.  Delving into colors, we have hues ranging from burnt orange to fern green.  As for textures and patterns, you'll find everything from knit and wall to denim.  On the left side of the screen, you can see the art style I've utilized as well as the prompt I used.  Meanwhile, on the right side, you'll find the image that was generated using Illustrate AI from design bundles.  A pencil scheme seems so surreal, amongst the stars in the golden green.
